extortion.description: PPM Industries SpAAdhesive tape PPM IndustriesAs a leading masking tape manufacturer, PPM Industries has been at the forefront of adhesive tape production since 1993.Our expertise in developing high-quality masking and adhesive tape solutions ensures that we meet diverse user requirements and applications across various markets.
